testcase.name: diamondBandFlow
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.ElementClickInterceptedException: element click intercepted: Element <button class="w-full h-16 my-5 border font-sans text-sm xl:text-lg 3xl:text-2xl 4xl:text-3xl 4xl:leading-none transition-colors duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest focus:outline-none border-theme-blue hover:bg-theme-blue bg-white text-theme-blue hover:text-white disabled:bg-white disabled:text-gray-400 disabled:border-gray-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed" aria-label="Proceed to checkout" aria-disabled="false" aria-busy="false" id="checkout-button" value="Continue">...</button> is not clickable at point (1392, 481). Other element would receive the click: <iframe title="Re:amaze Chat" allow="microphone; camera" allowfullscreen="" allowtransparency="true" style="width: 100% !important; height: 100% !important; border: 0px; position: relative;"></iframe> (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.142) Build info: version: '4.28.1', revision: '73f5ad48a2' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64',
